transcript_title: Document Dow Release 2 Doe Uap D003 Pajarito Astronomers
text: Dear Members, Pajarito Astronomers P.O. Box 1092, Los Alamos NM, 87544 President MS K553 Vice President MS E531 Treasurer MS F665 Sponsor Clob Tuesday, May 20, 1986 4 /? Our next meeting will be Thursday, May 29, 1986, in the Ranch Room at Fuller Lodge, at 7:30 p.m. Guest speaker will be Dr. John Warren of AT-6, whose topic will be "Why Should a Scientist be Concerned about UFO's?" To find the Ranch Room, go around (outside) to the south end of the Lodge (facing Central Ave.), and go upstairs. See you there.
